reviews.review_description:
Do not buy this game! This game is only single player (not multiplayer as in description). 

The game is also for left handed controls (it does not have an option to change to right handed option). 

You cannot do anything besides shoot 4 targets in a room for no purpose. 

There is nothing to do. I would not even recommend this game if it was “free”. I feel scammed out of my $4.

TLDR: Horrible gameplay, controls, and nothing to do in the game. Do not give this person a dime. It is not even worth your time trying it. What a rip off.

developer_response.body:
Hello ILuMyNation,

We are very sorry to hear you did not like the game.  We wanted to mention that it is necessary to pass the first test before opening the castle gate.  You must stand on the wooden platform and then you will have to hit 80% of your shots at the four targets in 2 minutes.  Not to give a spoiler, but there is a way to get out of the castle without passing the test ;-).  As per your feedback, we may consider doing a "wander" option in future updates where you can choose to have all the gates open at the start.  There is much more to see and do outside the castle and in the second level.  Concerning multiplayer, I apologize for the confusion.  It is our intention to eventually make multiplayer available, for now that path has been hindered, and we recently submitted an update to Meta (Oculus) updating our PDP to list the game as a single player experience.  We appreciate your feedback because it is through feedback both positive and negative that we grow.  BTW, did you happen to chat with the Scotsman?  His name is Dunham McCloud.  He would have been able to point you to the help menu where the goals of the game are listed.  The bows do fire from both hands.  The option to reverse the other controls is not currently part of the game, but we will consider it for future updates.

Thanks,

EJ at Orca Virtual
